title: Happy New Year Lyrics Unnai Ninaithu
stanzas:
happy new year
happy new year vandhadhe,
anbai solli aasai ullam thulludhe,

surya gandhi poo pola,
mugam maaruthae,
sugam serudhe.

happy new year
happy new year vandhadhe,
anbai solli aasai ullam thulludhe,

vaaranam aayiram,
soolla varam seiydhu,
naarana nambi,
nadakkindraan indredhir,
poorana porkudam,
vaiththu pooravengum,
thoarana naatta
kanaa kandaen, tholi,

engal vaalvai kavithai
thoguppaay aakkallaam,
anjal valiyae ellorukkum
anuppallaam,

vaanatthu megamaay
naam saernthu pogallaam.
poonkotthai polavae
mugam vaitthu vaazhallaam

nam sirippai padam piditthu,
vaazhthu madalai vannangidallaam,

happy new year ..
anbai solli aasai ullam
thulludhe..

thulasi chediyil malaiyin
thuliyai polavae.
engal vizhiyil
aanandhaththin eeramae.

Poovil orr paaththiram,
naam seiythu paarkkalaam.
paal soarai pottu naam
paravaikkum oottallaam.

kudai pidikkum thennai maram,
nammathu gunam solliyadhae,
vaazhnaatkal yaavumae.
vasanthangal veesa
vaazhnthiruppoamae.

happy new year
happy new year vandhadhe,
anbai solli aasai
ullam thulludhe,

surya gandhi poo pola,
mugam maaruthae,
sugam serudhe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Happy New Year?

The song celebrates the joy and excitement of welcoming a new year, filled with hope and happiness.

Who are the singers of Happy New Year from Unnai Ninaithu?

The song is sung by Sujatha Mohan and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for Unnai Ninaithu?

The music for the movie was composed by Sirpy.

What is the release year of the movie Unnai Ninaithu?

The movie was released in the year 2002.

What emotions does the song Happy New Year evoke?

The song evokes feelings of happiness, celebration, and a sense of new beginnings.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Unnai Ninaithu, the song Happy New Year is a joyful celebration of new beginnings. Sung by Sujatha Mohan and Unnikrishnan, it captures the excitement and hope that come with the arrival of a new year. The lyrics by Ra. Ravishankar express heartfelt wishes and aspirations, while Sirpy's music adds a melodious charm. This song is perfect for festive occasions, filling listeners with happiness and anticipation for the future.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Happy New Year from the movie Unnai Ninaithu is a vibrant celebration of new beginnings, brought to life by the melodious voices of Sujatha Mohan and Unnikrishnan. With Sirpy's enchanting music and Ra. Ravishankar's heartfelt lyrics, this song captures the joy and excitement of welcoming a new year. Dive into this delightful melody and let it fill your heart with happiness and hope.
stanzaMeanings: Happy New Year has come, expressing love, the heart is excited.
Like a sunflower, the face changes, happiness is felt.
Happy New Year has come, expressing love, the heart is excited.
A thousand elephants, granted a boon, Nambi walks today, I saw a dream of a decorated land, friend.
We can make our life a collection of poems, we can send courage to everyone.
We can go together like clouds in the sky. We can live with a smiling face like a flower bud.
We can capture our smiles in pictures and bow to the greeting card.
Even after a hundred years, can we make our name last tomorrow?
Happy New Year... expressing love, the heart is excited.
Like dew on a tulsi plant, in our eyes is the moisture of happiness.
We can make a vessel from a flower and see. We can feed the birds with milk cream.
The coconut tree that holds the umbrella tells our nature, all our days of living. We will live as springs blow.
Happy New Year has come, expressing love, the heart is excited.
Like a sunflower, the face changes, happiness is felt.
